sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ الرِّجَالُ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ لِصَلَاةِ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci su otišli u džamiju na džuma-namaz.
sentences.translationEn: The men went to the mosque for Friday prayer.

sentences.translation: Pažljivo su slušali hutbu i klanjali zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: They listened to the sermon attentively and prayed together.

sentences.translation: Nakon namaza razgovarali su i izmjenjivali selame.
sentences.translationEn: After the prayer they talked and exchanged greetings.

sentences.translation: Izašli su iz džamije smirenih srca.
sentences.translationEn: They left the mosque with peaceful hearts.
